titleStmt.title: SII 24.69: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 69. (A.R. No. 122 of 1938-39.) III PRĀKĀRA, EAST WALL.

summary.p: Registers a gift of land by Arigaṇḍadēvaṉ Āyarkoḻundinār alias Sēnāpatigaḷ Gaṅgaikoṇḍaśōḻa Muṉaiyadaraiyar of Koṭṭūr in Arumoḻidēva-vaḷanāḍu for a flower garden named after him and for offering on two festival days when the god was taken to the Arigaṇḍadēvaṉ tirumaṇḍapam. The record is dated in the 24th regnal year of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . ponnemiyaḷavun tannemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattuc cakkara koṭṭattu vikkiramat toḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvaraiyiṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri
ayir munai � vāḷurai ttu ttoḻivali kāṭṭip poṟ pari naṭātti kirttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākai cūṭit tenticait temaru kamalap pūmakaḷ potumaiyum ponniyāṭaiyum nannilap pāvai tanimaiyu
ntavira tannaṭi yiraṇṭun taṭa muṭiyākat ton nila ventar cūṭa munṉai manuvāṟu perukak kaliyāṟu vaṟuppac ceṅkol ticai toṟuñ cella veṇkuṭai Irunila viḷākam Eṅkaṇun tanātu
tiru niḻal ve tiṟaiviṭu tanta kalañ cori kaḷiṟu pa vilaṅkiya tennavan karun=talai paruntalaittiṭa tan ponnakar puṟattiṭai kiṭappa Innāḷ piṟkulap piṟai pol niṟpiḻai ye
nnuñ colletir tuṅkapattiraiyaḷavuṟṟu veṅkaṇum paṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟu viṭṭa tan mānamum kūṟina viramum kiṭappa Eṟina malai kaḷum mutuku ne
ḷippa Iḻinta natikaḷuñ cuḻanṟu� t talamara kuṭati pannāḷiṭṭa palapalamutukum payantetir māṟi jeyap perun=tiruvu paḻiyukantu kuṭutta pukaḻin celviyum vāḷāvi
ṭṭa maṭantaiyariṭṭamum miḷātu kuṭu ṅkaṇam Ennum pa ṭiṇṭiya pukaḻoṭu pāṇṭimaṇṭalaṅkoḷḷa (tiruvuḷḷat)tiruvuḷat taṭaittu veḷḷavaru parittalaṅ kaḷum porkari
ttalaṅkamum tantiravāriyu muṭaittā pola tan peruñ� poruta porkkaḷattañ Araṇenap pukka kāṭaṟattuṭaittu nāṭaṭip paṭuttu maṟṟavar tam
mai vanacarar tiriyum poṟṟa veñcura ṟum niṟutti mutti matta veṅkari paṭu maiyyaccayyamum kanniyuṅ kaikkoṇṭaruḷi tennāṭ ṭellai kāṭṭi malai nāṭṭuḷḷa cāveṟe
llāntani vicum peṟa māveṟiya k koṭṭāṟuṭpa tiṟal koḷ siṅhāsanan tiriyaviṭṭaruḷip poṅ koḷiyāramun tiruppuyattalaṅkaḷum pola viramu ntiyākamum
viḷaṅkap pārmicai mevalar vaṇaṅka viṟṟi rāna cakravatti coḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 4 Āvatu pāṇṭi kulācani vaḷanāṭṭu viḷānāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkattu Āḻvāṟku śrī kāriyañ ceyki
ṟa Atikārikaḷ viracoḻamuventaveḷār Eval paṭi śrī puliyūr tiruvāykkula muṭaiyā nampiyum māṅkaḷūr tiru varaṅka maṅkalattu parakecaric ceri śrī kurukūr nampiyum pe tiruma nel
lūr tirumalai Uṭaiyar nampiyum śrī paṇṭāravāriyam Ākat �na cirākavanum Āritan Ārāvamutu puṇṭarikanum Āritan tevan yan kecuvan Aṟivariyānum kāśyapan ciṅkan vaiyiṣṇavakkaṇa
kku tiruveṅkaṭavan tiruvākkula muṭaiyānum sabhaik kaṇakku num Ivvaṉaivom Arumoḻiteva vaḷanāṭṭu koṭṭur koṭ tevan Āyark koḻuntinārāna senāpatikaḷ kaṅkai ma muṉaiyatarai
yaṟku nāṅkaḷ Aṭutta nilamāvatu Āḻvār devatānam nāṭṭu viḷattūr nāṭṭu taṇṭuṟai nilam nenmali nāṭṭu dharmma n Utdeśam maṇaliṭāka kiṭanta nilat taṇṭuṟai
maṇaliṭāka kiṭanta nilattukku meṟkum ten pāṟ turān=taka viḷākattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai taṇṭuṟai nilattukkuk kiḻakkun teṟkum vaṭapāṟkellai taṇṭuṟai cakkalukkut te
ṟkum Āka Ivvicaitta perunāṅ kellaiyuḷḷaka m maṇṇilai kappaṭa nilam Onṟe kāl Innilam Onṟekālum tirutti tiruttina nilattukku punce varicaippaṭi Āḻvār śrī bhaṇṭā marakkālā
le veli Eṇ kala nellu Āṭṭāṇṭu toṟum Aḷakka kaṭavanākavum Ippaṭi veli Eṇkalamāka In nellu Aḷantu Itil mikutiyāl Uḷḷa vastukoṇṭu ĀyiraRead āyar • koḻuntennun tirunāmattāl Ivar ceyvikkiṟa tirunantavānam ceykiṟa śrī vayiṣṇavan śrīvira
nārāyaṇac caruppeti maṅkalattu vaṅkip puṟattuc cuntarat toḷuṭaiyānum Ivan tampi vaṅkip puṟattu śrī kṛṣṇanukkum jivanattukkum puṭavai mutalukkuṅ koṇṭu I tiruttuṟaimukattil Ivar Eṭuppitta Arikaṇṭa tevan tirumaṇṭapattil Aippikait tirunā
ḷum paṅkunit tirunāḷum tiruveṭṭai Eḻuntaruḷināl Oru tirunāḷaikku Avalamutu ceykaikku tū mutum caṟkaraiyamutu tin m campāramum teṅkāy pattum teriyilaiyamutu Aiññūṟṟum Aṭaikkāyamutu Aimpatum
kaṟpūra tayilamum koṇṭu Avalamutu Ippaṭiye Iraṇṭu tirunāḷilum Ivvaṅkip puṟattuc cuntarat toḷuṭaiyānum Ivan tampi ceyvikka kaṭavarkaḷākavum Innilañ cuṭṭi maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭitum tiruvāca
lil pon=ta kuṭimai ceyyak kaṭavārallātārākavum Ippaṭiye kallu veṭṭuvittuk koḷḷap peṟuvārākavum cantirātittavaṟ celuttik kuṭukka kaṭavomākavum Iparicu Icaintu Inni
lam Aṭuttuk kuṭuttom Arumoḻi tevavaḷanāṭṭu nenmali nāṭṭu koṭṭuruṭaiyā nāna Arikaṇṭa tevar ĀyirRead āyar •koḻuntinārāna senāpatikaḷ kaṅkaikoṇṭa coḻa munaiyataraiyaṟku Āḻ
vār kanmikaḷ perumpuliyūr tiruvāykkulamuṭaiyā(r) nampiyum māṅkaḷūr tiru varaṅkap paṭṭanum śrī viranārāyaṇac caruppeti maṅkalattu kurukūrnampiyum perumpuliyūr tiru maṇal tūṇamutum nellūr tirumalai Uṭaiyā nam
piyum paṇṭāravāriyam Āritan tiruvāykkulamuṭaiyān cirākavanum Āritan Ārā vamutum n tani Iḷañciṅkamum pāratāyan kecavan Aṟivāriyānum kaāśyapan ciṅkan tiruvaraṅka nārāyaṇanum koyiṟ kaṇakku
t tiruvaraṅkan Ārāvamutum śrīvaiyiṣṇavak kaṇakku tiruveṅkaṭavan tiruvāykkula kumuṭai ṉaivom śrī vaiyiṣṇavak kaṇakku tiruveṅkaṭavan tiruvāk kulamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai tiruvaraṅkapaṭṭan Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 24.69 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
